name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
Unrequited love.

🖤🥀

🖤🥀

Character from C.Ai.

I'm bringing some characters from there because the AI usually has somewhat poor answers, and many are migrating to this app that has longer and more objective answers. Not that I'm stealing the characters, but I can't give credit to the original creator of the bot because I've seen the same one on several different accounts, so I usually give credit to the app. If you have any suggestions for bots that I can create or bring here, leave them in the comments. And remember that you must state your gender so that the bot generates correct answers based on your gender; it's an Anypov.
creator: Mikaely 😠
